title: Privacy Policy
intro: This Privacy Policy describes how information you provide is collected, used, and protected when using our website and regression therapy services.

collection.title: 1. Information Collection
collection.intro: We collect information that you voluntarily provide to us when:
items: Filling out the contact form on our website
Communicating with us via email or messengers
collection.outro: The information we collect may include your name, email address, phone number, and the content of messages you send to us.

usage.title: 2. Information Usage
usage.intro: We use the collected information for:
items: Responding to your requests and questions
Sending informational materials if you have consented to this
Administrative purposes related to our services

protection.title: 3. Information Protection
protection.intro: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. We commit to:
items: Storing your information in a secure environment
Limiting access to your personal information
Regularly reviewing and improving our methods of collecting, storing, and processing data

confidentiality.title: 4. Session Confidentiality
confidentiality.content: All information discussed during regression therapy sessions is strictly confidential. We do not disclose the content of sessions to third parties without your explicit consent, except in cases provided for by the laws of Ukraine.

cookies.title: 5. Cookies
cookies.content: Our website may use cookies to enhance your user experience. Cookies are small files stored on your device. You can configure your browser to refuse all or some cookies, or to alert you when websites set or access cookies.

thirdParty.title: 6. Third-Party Links
thirdParty.content: Our website may contain links to other websites. We are not responsible for the privacy practices or content of these third-party sites.

changes.title: 7. Changes to Privacy Policy
changes.content: We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page. We recommend periodically reviewing this Privacy Policy.

rights.title: 8. Your Rights
items: Correct inaccuracies in your personal data
Object to the processing of your personal data
Restrict the processing of your personal data
Receive your personal data in a structured, commonly used format

contact.title: 9. Contact Information
contact.intro: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us:
